Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 227 9TH Street Apartment is present. Represented by Cathleen Holman.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Montoya is present
Attorney Tarek Sorensen for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of September 26, 2016 is vacated. (501)
